title: Reusable State Summary
description: Hypothesis-friendly state summary exported from the Windows CUA Lab for downstream consumers.

stateLabel.description: Human-readable label for the state hypothesis, such as 'paint-canvas-updated' or 'calculator-result-visible'.

confidence.description: Normalized confidence for the state hypothesis.

status.description: Whether the state hypothesis is established, unknown, or internally conflicted.

summary.description: Short natural-language explanation of the state hypothesis.

evidenceRefs.description: References to screenshots, verifier traces, or reports that support the state hypothesis.

unknownMarkers.description: Specific areas the downstream consumer should treat as unresolved.

conflicts.description: Descriptions of conflicting evidence or contradictory reads.

sourceTransitionIds.description: Transition envelope identifiers that contributed to this summary.
